def positive_semaphore_acquired_without_async_with_context_manager():
    rule_id = "semaphore_acquired_without_async_with_context_manager"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "asyncio.Semaphore acquired via .acquire() without async with, risking a missed release on exception."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
